changes.description: Removed all Aitri v1.x legacy pipeline artifact directories from the repository.
Removed stale docs: migration plan for unexecuted migration, superseded release notes, and point-in-time checkpoint snapshot.

README.md rewritten to document current stack (Phaser 3.90 + Vite 5 + node --test), architecture components (GameScene, AudioManager, gameRules.js, ui.js), directory structure (src/audio/, src/locale/, src/scenes/, src/modules/), setup commands, controls, and difficulty curve.

Appended Section 9 documenting AudioManager (src/audio/AudioManager.js) with initialization contract and public interface, src/locale/ui.js with exports and consuming scene, and getDifficultyProfile with return shape and location.

Added implementation_notes fields to FR-006 (referencing AudioManager and src/locale/ui.js) and FR-007 (referencing getDifficultyProfile and extracted module paths). No acceptance criteria, IDs, or priorities changed.

Replaced 8 source-text regex tests (TC-5 through TC-16) with 23 behavioral tests that import AudioManager, UI locale, GAME_CONSTANTS, getDifficultyProfile, resolveShotTarget, applyShotOutcome, applyCivilianLostPenalty, applyCivilianSaved, buildWaveComposition, calculateAccuracy, and createInitialState directly and verify observable return values. Total test count raised from 12 to 27.
03_TEST_CASES.json for the stabilizacion feature describes each test case in terms of module imports, function calls, and observable return values — not regex patterns.
Absolute path /Users/cesareyeserrano/... replaced with relative path. Already committed.
GitHub Actions workflow added. Already committed.
.gitignore fixed with dist/, .env, *.log, .nyc_output/, .cache/ entries. Already committed.
